title: M. Fragapane & Sons Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: The ACCC commenced Federal Court civil proceedings against M. Fragapane & Sons, alongside three other suppliers and named senior executives (its general sales manager, noted here as context only and not recorded as a separate candidate), alleging price fixing on 84 occasions in the supply of fresh produce to ALDI stores in NSW, Victoria and Queensland between 2018 and 2024.
scope: Subject of Federal Court civil cartel proceedings instituted by the ACCC, alleging price fixing on 84 occasions; Alleged conduct concerns supply of fresh produce to ALDI across three states between 2018 and 2024; Proceedings are ongoing; allegations not yet determined by the court
